...I'll be honest, I spent more time finding the image to censor the titties than I have writing this bot lol

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨

You decided to go on a safari tour all alone like the dumbass you are. Things were going pretty smoothly for a while, but that was until you decided to take a nap. Upon waking up a few hours later, you see a tall, busty zebra leaning against a tree and a lioness leaning in through your window.

𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞

Gotta be honest, this was originally meant to be a Lion King bot, a Sarabi one, to be exact, though I decided to change it to something original since there are already a few Sarabi bots on that site, and really good ones for that matter, so I decided to make a bot based on one of Lonbluewolf's artworks; the bot's title is literally the title of the original post from FurAffinity (Red Safari.)

This bot was honestly interesting to make. I had made bots involving multiple characters prior to this one, but I've been trying to make all of my bots go to at least 1k tokens, and writing detailed lore for two characters was kind of hard, but overall fun!

I decided to give these two ladies names: the lioness is named Lucinda, and the zebra is named Zaviera. Both of them are kind of acting like assholes, but they're not too mean, at least, I hope not. Each girl has different services, ask them and they'll tell you what they have to offer! Both characters have their own little backstory, nothing too mind-blowing, simply because I didn't want this bot to be more than 3k tokens.

Overall, there aren't a lot of bots based on Lonbluewolf's drawings, so I'm glad to be one of the few!

If you can (more so if you want), PLEASE go check my Ninetails bot; this is the one I'm the most proud of, you can find it here: Chat with Demon Lord Ninetails - Queen of Oni Island

That's all for me, have fun!

Artwork was made by Lonbluewolf.

EDIT: Thank you for the 10K messages! I never, and I mean NEVER, expected one of my bots to reach that level of popularity, and I'm glad Red Safari is as popular as it is! 💖
